sentences.arabic: يَقُولُ النَّاسُ: «الْوَقْتُ كَالسَّيْفِ إِنْ لَمْ تَقْطَعْهُ قَطَعَكَ».
sentences.translation: Ljudi kažu: «Vrijeme je poput mača; ako ga ne odrežeš, ono će odrezati tebe».
sentences.translationEn: People say: «Time is like a sword; if you do not cut it, it will cut you».

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ الْوَقْتَ ثَمِينٌ وَيَجِبُ أَنْ نَسْتَخْدِمَهُ جَيِّدًا.
sentences.translation: To znači da je vrijeme dragocjeno i da ga moramo dobro koristiti.
sentences.translationEn: This means that time is precious and we must use it well.

sentences.arabic: نَسِيَ عُمَرُ مَوْعِدَ الِاجْتِمَاعِ لِأَنَّهُ لَمْ يُنَظِّمْ وَقْتَهُ.
sentences.translation: Omar je zaboravio termin sastanka jer nije organizovao svoje vrijeme.
sentences.translationEn: Omar forgot the meeting time because he did not organize his time.

sentences.arabic: بَدَأَ بَعْدَ ذَلِكَ يَكْتُبُ مَوَاعِيدَهُ فِي دَفْتَرٍ صَغِيرٍ.
sentences.translation: Nakon toga je počeo zapisivati termine u malu bilježnicu.
sentences.translationEn: After that he started writing his appointments in a small notebook.
